name: Lode Runner
description: The 1983 Broderbund classic in its original style: a black field of brick and concrete, yellow ladders and ropes, gold to grab and magenta guards that hunt you down a distance field. Run, climb, hang on ropes, fall, and dig holes in the brick to trap the guards. Collect every chest, then the escape ladders appear — climb to the top to clear the stage. Hold the D-pad to move, tap to dig.
